licenseProof.downloadCertificateNote: The official certificate endpoint requires a Pixabay account; the public official asset and license pages were recorded without bypassing login.

notes: Version 0.1 uses Android system Chinese TTS for guided speech.
The 478 cue tones are generated procedurally at runtime.
The bundled ambient track was downloaded from the official Pixabay asset page and is intended for quiet looping in guided non-478 sessions.
The 478 session remains cue-only so the inhale and exhale tones stay distinct.
